fields.name: creationDate
fields.description: The time when the activity was created

fields.name: endDate
fields.description: The time when the activity was ended (copy of the date associated to the SUCCEEDED, CANCELED or FAILED stage)

fields.name: lastStageName
fields.description: Name of the last completed stage

fields.name: message
fields.description: A free text (copy of the last stage message)

fields.name: payload
fields.description: The copy of the origin user request

fields.name: priority
fields.description: A priority indicator between 1 and 9. 1 is the highest.

fields.name: startDate
fields.description: The time when the activity was started (date of the first stage that is not QUEUED)

fields.name: status
fields.description: Status of the activity (copy of the last stage status)
